{{Quote|Pity to say, the High Council no longer exists... either as individuals, or as a political entity.|Lord Tion, to Princess Leia, about the High Council|<ref name="Empire 5">[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]]</ref>}}
The '''Ralltiiri High Council''' was the primary government of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] until being disbanded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Tion (Lord)/Legends|Tion]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. All members of the council were slaughtered by Tion's men after he discovered sympathizers to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] among its members.

The High Council was reestablished after the Empire was driven off Ralltiir.
